name: Ham Stromboli
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. Unroll pizza dough on a greased jelly-roll pan; pat dough into a 12-inch square.
3. Spread mustard over dough within 1/2 inch of the edges.
4. Layer ham slices down the center, leaving a 3-inch border on either side and a 1/2-inch border at the top and bottom.
5. Top ham with pepperoni. Sprinkle with Italian seasoning and cheese.
6. Fold sides of dough over the filling, pinching the center seam, top, and bottom to seal.
7. Bake for 15-20 minutes or until lightly browned. Makes 6 servings.
